creator: sada@e-mail.ne.jp
text:
ports/japanese/netscape4 is now obsolete, distfiles are not available on the
	net.

	Here is the renewed Japanized Netscape port for version 4.05:

Fix: 

Please remove the whole directory `ports/japanese/netscape4' and commit
	new ports of ja-netscape-4.05 . Tarball is put at:

		ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.ORG/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/
			ja-netscape-4.05-1998-0517.tar.gz
